name: neo-linoleum
author: neostryder (RPGM Tools)
description: Bundled freely-licensed graphics tile packs. Registers the Original, Adam Bolt, David Gervais, and Nomad tilesets so a graphics mode can be picked in Options (not only via ?tiles=/?graf= URL). Shockbolt is deliberately excluded (bespoke licence). ASCII stays the default; each pack is opt-in. Default-on and fully removable.
